name: dchub
description: Global data center intelligence platform — real-time tracking of 20,000+ facilities across 169 countries, M&A deals, capacity pipelines, site risk assessment, and energy infrastructure.
author: DC Hub Nexus

capabilities.name: Data Center Search
capabilities.description: Search 20,000+ data centers by name, location, provider, or capacity

capabilities.name: M&A Deal Tracking
capabilities.description: 470+ verified data center M&A deals, acquisitions, and investments

capabilities.name: Market Intelligence
capabilities.description: Capacity pipeline, market trends, and regional analysis

capabilities.name: Site Risk Assessment
capabilities.description: Composite risk scoring: water, seismic, hazards, climate for any coordinate

capabilities.name: Energy Infrastructure
capabilities.description: Power plants, grid demand, fuel mix, carbon intensity near any site

capabilities.name: Infrastructure Mapping
capabilities.description: 40+ layers: fiber routes, substations, pipelines, transmission lines

capabilities.name: Industry News
capabilities.description: Real-time data center news from 60+ RSS feeds

capabilities.name: Site Scoring
capabilities.description: Multi-factor site evaluation for data center placement
